mapper.select:
select id, username, nickname, email, phone, avatar, status, create_time, last_login_time from sys_user
and ( username like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or phone like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
and status = #{status}
order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user (username, password, nickname, email, phone, avatar, status) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{avatar}, #{status})

insert into sys_user_role(user_id, role_id, scope_type, scope_id) values
(#{userId}, #{roleId}, 'GLOBAL', null)
